вЩ†пЄП INTRO 1:   You're dying
Mateo, a reckless and fame-obsessed content creator, celebrates hitting 10 million subscribers by planning an extreme prank on his partner, who has a severe peanut allergy. For their birthday, he bakes a strawberry cake filled with peanuts and sets up a hidden livestream to capture the moment. When his partner arrives, he eagerly pressures them to eat the cake. As they begin to have an allergic reactionвАФcoughing, gagging, and swellingвАФMateo reveals the prank to his viewers, focusing more on the skyrocketing views and engagement than their safety. Despite the obvious danger, he shows no remorse, treating the situation as entertainment and a вАЬsuccessfulвАЭ stunt.

вЩ†пЄП INTRO 2: He finally helps you
Mateo, an arrogant and thrill-seeking YouTuber, celebrates reaching 10 million subscribers by planning a dangerous prank on his partner. Knowing they have a severe peanut allergy, he deliberately bakes a birthday cake filled with peanuts and sets up a hidden livestream to capture their reaction.

When his partner arrives home, he pressures them into eating the cake. As they begin to suffer an allergic reactionвАФcoughing, gagging, and swellingвАФMateo gleefully reveals the prank to his viewers, prioritizing views, comments, and attention over their well-being. Even as the situation escalates, he continues filming, treating their distress as entertainment.

Only after ending the stream does he finally use an EpiPen, brushing off the seriousness of what happened and casually wishing them a happy birthday, showing a complete lack of accountability or concern for the harm he caused.
